gap_notes: No verified SSE/event stream yet -- /logs/stream/{source} exists but is path-parameterized, not a bare no-param route.

The BeamCore OpenAPI schema declares no security on all 53 paths, but most are actually auth-gated in practice (401): auth/me, auth/keys, clients, destinations, transfers, orchestrators/pending-transfers, orchestrators/workers, Validator/epoch-summary/latest-epoch, jobs, internal/routing/live. Only validators/orchestrators and status/orchestrator-relays are genuinely public -- both added as new surfaces.

name: Beam
notes: First maintainer review for SN105. Corrected source_repo from a generic Beam-Network org repositories-listing page to the specific Beam-Network/beam repo already cited throughout the file's existing surfaces. Added website + source-repo surfaces. Diffed the 53-path BeamCore OpenAPI schema and live-tested every no-param candidate: most declare no security but are actually 401-gated in practice; only 2 genuinely public routes were promoted.

surfaces.name: BeamCore API OpenAPI schema
surfaces.notes: Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.0 schema for the BeamCore control-plane HTTP API (title: BeamCore API). Served publicly at beamcore.b1m.ai; documents orchestrator, worker, validator, and health routes for SN105 Beam.

surfaces.name: BeamCore API health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /health on beamcore.b1m.ai returning control-plane liveness JSON (ok, db, schema, metagraph sync). Documented in the subnet OpenAPI spec on the same host; beamcore.b1m.ai is the CORE_SERVER_URL configured in the official Beam README.

surfaces.name: BeamCore orchestrator UID range config
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /config/uid-ranges on beamcore.b1m.ai returning the public orchestrator UID window (public_orchestrator_uid_start, public_orchestrator_uid_end, max_orchestrators). Documented as a route in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema (already-registered sn-105-beam-openapi surface); same beamcore.b1m.ai host as the existing health surface.

surfaces.name: Beam routing orchestrators
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning active orchestrator nodes (hotkey, url, region). Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema.

surfaces.name: Beam worker capacity
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning total and per-orchestrator worker capacity. Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema.

surfaces.name: Beam website
surfaces.notes: Official SN105 Beam website -- verified live 2026-07-16.

surfaces.name: Beam source repository
surfaces.notes: Official SN105 Beam source repository -- verified live 2026-07-16.

surfaces.name: Beam validator orchestrator list
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /validators/orchestrators on beamcore.b1m.ai returning the orchestrator list as seen by validators (uid, hotkey, name, url, status, worker_count, bandwidth_mbps). Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema. Distinct from the already-registered /routing/orchestrators surface (a different endpoint on the same host).

surfaces.name: Beam orchestrator relay hotkeys
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /status/orchestrator-relays on beamcore.b1m.ai returning the list of orchestrator relay hotkeys. Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema.
